name: cashfree-cli
description: Agent-native CLI for Cashfree Payments. Prove an integration works end to end: init, simulate, listen, verify.

scripts.codegen: openapi-typescript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cashfree/cashfree-mcp/main/src/openapi/openapi-PG.json -o src/api/generated/pg.ts && openapi-typescript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cashfree/cashfree-mcp/main/src/openapi/openapi-PO.json -o src/api/generated/payout.ts && openapi-typescript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cashfree/cashfree-mcp/main/src/openapi/openapi-VRS.json -o src/api/generated/verification.ts

author: Mothi Venkatesh
